original_title: Microsoft: Hackers abusing AI at every stage of cyberattacks
selection_reasoning: This represents a fundamental shift in the nature of threats - the democratization of sophisticated attack capabilities through AI. It's a perfect example of how new technologies can be double-edged, and translates well to fantasy concepts of dark sorcery or corrupted magic being used to amplify traditional threats.

field_note.title: The Dark Amplification
field_note.subtitle: When Shadow Sorcerers Harness New Powers
field_note.excerpt: Across every stage of their campaigns, shadow practitioners now wield artificial minds to amplify their reach and lower the barriers to their dark craft.
field_note.epigraph: The most dangerous evolution is not new sorcery, but old malice given amplification.
body_paragraphs: A troubling transformation spreads across the shadow realms as practitioners of the dark arts discover artificial minds as multipliers of their malice. No longer content to wield these thinking engines for mere efficiency, they now embed them throughout their campaigns-from the initial reconnaissance of targets to the final harvesting of spoils. What once required years of apprenticeship and rare expertise can now be accomplished by any ambitious novice with access to these amplifying spirits.

The acceleration is unprecedented. Where shadow practitioners once spent weeks crafting personalized deceptions, they now generate thousands of tailored lures in hours. Where they once struggled to maintain persistent presence across multiple kingdoms simultaneously, artificial minds now manage entire campaigns with tireless attention. The technical barriers that once separated amateur mischief-makers from master infiltrators continue to crumble.

Most concerning is how this amplification scales not just individual capabilities, but the entire ecosystem of malice. Lesser practitioners, emboldened by their artificial assistants, attempt increasingly ambitious sieges. The flood of low-skill but high-volume attacks strains defensive resources, while the truly skilled adversaries use the same tools to achieve previously unimaginable reach and sophistication.

Yet as these chronicles have long recorded, every amplification of shadow arts eventually breeds its counter. The same artificial minds that serve corruption can be turned toward defense, creating an escalating dance of augmented minds on both sides of the eternal conflict. The wise kingdom prepares not just for smarter enemies, but for a future where both siege and defense operate at the speed of artificial thought.
